name: law 6: a named entity is decoded in the plain text (& becomes &)
law 6: an accented named entity is decoded (é becomes e-acute)
law 6: a decimal numeric reference is decoded (é becomes e-acute)
law 6: a hexadecimal numeric reference is decoded (é becomes e-acute)
law 6: a decoded entity inside a styled span is carried by the run's text
law 8: <i> is parsed before decoding, so it is literal visible text, never formatting
law 8: an entity-escaped tag stays literal even next to a real tag that does style
law 8: a literal 3 < 4 is preserved, the < is not a tag start
law 8: an entity-escaped 3 < 4 decodes to the literal comparison, not a tag
laws 6/10:   decodes to a space and collapses with adjacent whitespace
